MAHDEV ERP SYSTEM

Centralize Your Business Ecosystem

Robust custom-engineered ERP platforms designed to automate retail POS, warehouse inventory, financial bookkeeping, and employee HR.

INTEGRATED MODULES

End-to-End Enterprise Architecture

Omnichannel POS Billing

Blazing-fast billing terminal running offline-first, syncs in milliseconds once online. Support for thermal printers & barcode guns.

Thermal printer drivers integrated
Quick barcode scanning
Dynamic discount models
Multi-payment checkouts

Multi-Warehouse Inventory

Real-time stock movement, safety threshold alerts, auto-reordering formulas, and batch expiry tracking.

Real-time stock ledger
Automated purchase orders
FIFO / LIFO valuations
Batch & Expiry tracking

Double-Entry Accounting

Automated ledger postings from POS checkout terminals. Comprehensive balance sheets, profit & loss, and tax audits.

Direct bank reconciliation
Dynamic expense tracking
Automated tax returns
Multi-currency support

HR, Payroll & Biometrics

Unified employee records, biometric clock-in API sync, cloud shift schedulers, and salary slip generators.

Biometric & GPS clock-ins
PF & ESI automated tax
Performance appraisals tracker
One-click salary bank transfers

Vertical Specifics (POS/Hotel)

Tailored workflow platforms for specialized domains: school fees, clinical health files, hotel occupancy, and dining tables.

School grades & fee tracking
Clinical OP/IP doctor portal
Restaurant table & KOT printing
Retail cross-store stock share
